phrases.intent_en: Ask where to pick up audio guides
phrases.cultural_note: Audio guides are typically collected at the main information point before entering historic sections.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na receção ou na bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN OHW NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the reception or ticket booth.

responses.english: Ask at the reception or ticket booth.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN OHW NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to reach Sala dos Capelos
phrases.text_local: Como chego à Sala dos Capelos?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo AH SAH-luh DOOSH kuh-PEH-loosh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Sala dos Capelos hosts traditional academic ceremonies and exams.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sala dos Capelos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DOOSH kuh-PEH-loosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Sala dos Capelos.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Sala dos Capelos.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DOOSH kuh-PEH-loosh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Sala dos Capelos.

phrases.text_local: Como chegar à Sala dos Capelos?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo shih-GAHR AH SAH-luh DOOSH kuh-PEH-loosh?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao rececionista ou ao monitor na bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW reh-sih-seeoo-NEESH-tuh OHW OW moo-nee-TOHR NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the receptionist or the student guide at the ticket booth.

phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DOOSH kuh-PEH-loosh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sala dos Capelos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy Joanina Library tickets
phrases.text_local: Onde compro bilhetes para a Biblioteca Joanina?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-dih KOM-proo-zoosh bee-YEH-teesh PAH-ruh uh zhwa-NEE-nuh? (link: -z- sound)
phrases.cultural_note: The Joanina Library is a UNESCO heritage site with strict visitor limits.

likely_response.local: Na bilheteira da entrada principal da universidade.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL DUH oo-nee-veh-ruh-see-DAH-dih.
likely_response.translation_en: At the main entrance ticket office of the university.

responses.english: At the main entrance ticket office of the university.
responses.phonetic: NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH ayngt-RAH-duh preen-see-PAHL DUH oo-nee-veh-ruh-see-DAH-dih.
responses.local: Na bilheteira da entrada principal da universidade.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy Joanina Library tickets

phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih KOHMP-roo bee-LYEH-tihsh PUH-ruh AH beeb-leeoo-TEH-kuh zhoouh-NEE-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Os bilhetes para a Biblioteca Joanina são vendidos na bilheteira da Portagem, não na biblioteca.

likely_response.translation_en: Tickets at the Portagem ticket booth.

phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo leh-vahnng-TAHR AW GEEUH OW-deeoo?

phrases.text_local: Onde posso comprar bilhetes para a Biblioteca Joanina?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à receção no Pátio das Escolas para adquirir bilhetes.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH reh-sih-SOWN NOO PAHT-yoo DUHSH SHKOH-luhsh PUH-ruh uhd-kee-REER bee-LYEH-tihsh.
